queries.question: Show all the newspaper publications, in addition show only the weekly magazine publications.
queries.sql:
SELECT Publications.title 
FROM Publications
WHERE Publications.Print_Media = "Newspaper" OR Publications.Print_Media = "Magazine" AND Publications.Publication_Frequency = "Weekly"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?publications a :Publications .
  ?publications p:Title ?title .
  ?publications p:Print_Media ?print_media_w .
  ?publications p:Print_Media ?print_media_w2 .
  ?publications p:Publication_Frequency ?publication_frequency_w .
  FILTER((STR(?print_media_w) = "Newspaper" || (STR(?print_media_w2) = "Magazine" && STR(?publication_frequency_w) = "Weekly")))
}

queries.question: List both newspaper and magazine publications where either one is issued weekly.
queries.sql:
SELECT Publications.title 
FROM Publications
WHERE (Publications.Print_Media = "Newspaper" OR Publications.Print_Media = "Magazine") AND Publications.Publication_Frequency = "Weekly"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?publications a :Publications .
  ?publications p:Title ?title .
  ?publications p:Print_Media ?print_media_w .
  ?publications p:Print_Media ?print_media_w2 .
  ?publications p:Publication_Frequency ?publication_frequency_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?print_media_w) = "Newspaper" || STR(?print_media_w2) = "Magazine")) && STR(?publication_frequency_w) = "Weekly"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me all newspaper publications and magazine publications that come out weekly.
